loadout_progress.improvement_summary: Euro panfish fishery. First telescopic rod deployment (Troy 23' with Pinkies under float). Knocked out Exploration I-II missions + Fish Monster qualifying catches.

overall_analysis.location_style: SHORE-ONLY pond. Cheap travel. Dense Euro panfish targets. Ideal for telescopic + float fishing + single spinning rod for pike bycatch.
mvp_baits: Bloodworms - European Perch, small Prussian Carp
Semolina Balls - Tench, Common Carp, Mirror Carp
Small Minnows - under float for sub-1.1 lb pike (Fish Monster mission)
recommended_loadout: Troy 23' / TeleFloat 14'9" telescopic with Pinkies or Bloodworms under float - primary panfish rod
Light spinning rod (Zeus 8'2" NE or JigWinner 8'10") with Titanium leader + small spinner for Pike bycatch
Optional: feeder rod for Tench/Carp with groundbait
overall_analysis.user_verdict: ONE-AND-DONE for mission completion. User did not enjoy the location after completing Exploration I-II. Not a return destination for income.

available_but_skipped: Lesní Víla - Pike Fins Lure (Fish Monster) - requires 5 Pike <1.1 lb
Lesní Víla - Perch Bully (Fish Monster) - requires Trophy European Perch
